reason: The current meta description is generic; a more specific description mentioning key services and CTAs can improve click-through from search results.

The FAQ states free shipping over $100 but the site-wide announcement bar on every page says 'Free Shipping Over $80' — these should be consistent, and Crystal should confirm which threshold is correct.
Expand the meta description to mention page content (before & afters, FAQs, booking) for richer SERP snippets and improved CTR.
Enriches the About page meta description with role keywords already used on the page (lip blushing specialist, founder, Nude by Crystal) for better search visibility.
